zh.lifeSummary: 當John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty於1368年出生在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪時，他的父親Adam Urquhart de Urchard 2nd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty19歲，母親Lady Brigida Fleming18歲。他於大約1393年與Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1425年享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty于1368年出生在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪时，他的父亲Adam Urquhart de Urchard 2nd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty19岁，母亲Lady Brigida Fleming18岁。他于大约1393年与Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1425年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Urquhart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Ross and Cromarty): habitational name from any of various places in Scotland so called, notably the barony of Urquhart (Inverness), or places in Ross and Cromarty, Morayshire, and Fife. All are thought to derive from Pictish ar ‘on, by’ + Pictish carden ‘enclosure’ or ‘wood, copse’. Some bearers of this name trace their descent from William de Urchard, who fought for Robert the Bruce between 1297 and 1328.

variants.name: Orcutt
meanings: English (Staffordshire): perhaps a much altered form of Scottish   Urquhart  .

variants.name: Orchard
meanings: topographic or occupational name from residence near (or perhaps employment at) an orchard, Middle English orchard (Old English ortgeard, orceard).

habitational name from any of the places called Orchard. Those in Devon and Somerset are named from Old English ortgeard, orceard (a compound of wort, wyrt ‘plant’ (later associated with Latin hortus ‘garden’) + geard ‘yard, enclosure’), while East and West Orchard near Shaftesbury in Dorset derive from Primitive Welsh ar ‘beside, in front of, facing’ + ced ‘wood’.
rare variant of Scottish   Urquhart  . Compare   Orahood  .

nameMeanings.name: John

en.lifeSummary: When John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty was born in 1368, in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, his father, Adam Urquhart de Urchard 2nd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty, was 19 and his mother, Lady Brigida Fleming, was 18. He married Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie about 1393, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1425, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty est né en 1368, à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse, son père, Adam Urquhart de Urchard 2nd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Brigida Fleming, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie environ 1393, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1425, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty 1368 in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Urquhart de Urchard 2nd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty 19 und seine Mutter Lady Brigida Fleming 18. Er hat um 1393 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1425 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty è nato il nel 1368 nel Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Adam Urquhart de Urchard 2nd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Brigida Fleming, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie circa 1393, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1425, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromartyが1368年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイで生まれた時，父Adam Urquhart de Urchard 2nd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromartyは19歳，母Lady Brigida Flemingは18歳であった。約1393年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでLady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1425年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty(이)가 1368년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Urquhart de Urchard 2nd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Brigida Fleming(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1393년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1425년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty nasceu em 1368, em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, seu pai, Adam Urquhart de Urchard 2nd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Brigida Fleming, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie aproximadamente 1393, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1425, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty родился в 1368 г. в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Adam Urquhart de Urchard 2nd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Brigida Fleming, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie около 1393 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1425 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie aproximadamente 1393, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
